description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, deploy, test, and release using ubuntu:16.04 for the build job and chusiang/ansible:alpine-3.6 for deployment and testing jobs, all running on docker runners. In the build stage add a build_binary job that runs chmod 755 penguin-htdocs/DEBIAN then dpkg -b penguin-htdocs, and stores the resulting penguin-htdocs.deb as an artifact that expires in one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy_to_dev job that runs ls, cd ansible-playbooks/, echoes "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt, executes ansible-playbook deploy.yml, then removes secret.txt; it runs only on the master, develop branches or tags of the chusiang/coscup2017-cd-demo project. In the test stage add a test_dev job that cd ansible-playbooks/, echoes "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt, runs ansible-playbook test.yml, and removes secret.txt; it runs on the same branch/tag conditions as the deploy job. In the release stage add a release_to_prd job that cd ansible-playbooks/, echoes "${VAULT_KEY}" > secret.txt, runs ansible-playbook -i production deploy.yml, and removes secret.txt; it runs only on the master branch or tags of the same project.
